title: xanthophyllum suberosum
intro: Xanthophyllum suberosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the "leather-leafed polygala". This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum suberosum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues. Xanthophyllum suberosum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its leaves can also be used in traditional medicine preparations, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
